message:
fix(fr-runtime+fr-command): COPY src==dst guard + RESTORE BUSYKEY precedence (br-frankenredis-ao1i)

Upstream rejects:
  - COPY where source == destination (same DB) with 'ERR source and
    destination objects are the same', before touching the store,
    regardless of REPLACE. Adds the guard to both Runtime's
    handle_copy_command (the path conformance drives) and
    fr_command::copy_cmd.
  - RESTORE onto an existing key with 'BUSYKEY Target key name already
    exists.' BEFORE validating the payload, so a malformed RESTORE at
    an occupied key surfaces BUSYKEY rather than
    'DUMP payload version or checksum are wrong'. Mirrors
    legacy_redis_code/redis/src/cluster.c::restoreCommand ordering
    (lookupKeyWrite → busy check → verifyDumpPayload).

Live oracle: core_copy now 102/102 (was 99/102).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
